title: HK Solutions Expert Featured in Retirement Film
summary: Keith Helmendach of HK Solutions is featured in 'Retirement Everest,' a film examining the risks of decumulation after retirement.
charlotte_impact: Highlights financial planning challenges post-retirement and expert insights on navigating those challenges.

title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves 2 Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and several injuries. Police are investigating.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on communities.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Promotes advancements in polymer technology and provides training opportunities for industry professionals.

title: North Carolina Monitoring Hantavirus Exposure Linked to Cruise
summary: North Carolina is monitoring potential hantavirus exposure linked to a cruise ship, with a high mortality rate.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness of infectious disease risks and the importance of public health monitoring.

title: CMPD Officers Cleared in Deadly Crime Spree Shooting
summary: Mecklenburg County DA clears CMPD officers in the shooting of a suspect involved in a deadly crime spree in October 2025.
charlotte_impact: Addresses issues of police accountability and the legal justification for the use of deadly force.

title: Charlotte Rescinds Support for I-77 Toll Lane Project
summary: Charlotte City Council votes to rescind support for the I-77 toll lane project and requests NCDOT to pause the project.
charlotte_impact: Reflects local opposition to toll roads and their potential impact on traffic and accessibility.

title: South Carolina Leaders Consider Redrawing Congressional Districts
summary: South Carolina leaders are considering redrawing congressional districts ahead of midterm elections, raising concerns about minority voting rights.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the potential for gerrymandering to disenfranchise minority voters.

title: Fatal Shooting in Kannapolis
summary: One person was killed in a shooting outside a home on Woodlawn Street in Kannapolis.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about rising gun violence in the region.

title: Catawba County Teacher Arrested for Assaulting Student
summary: Christina McCarthy, a teacher in Catawba County, was arrested for allegedly assaulting a student by pulling and jerking their arm.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about student safety and teacher conduct in schools.

title: I-77 Crash Near State Line Closes Two Lanes
summary: A crash on I-77 North near Westinghouse Boulevard resulted in one person injured and two lanes closed.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the impact of traffic accidents on daily commutes.

title: I-77 Reopens After Car Fire
summary: I-77 North reopens after a car fire near Clanton Road caused massive delays in southwest Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the disruption caused by vehicle fires on major roadways.

title: Union County Foster Mom Urges Others to Open Homes
summary: A Union County foster mom encourages others to become foster parents as the need for foster homes grows.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the critical need for foster families and the positive impact of foster care.

title: Man Airlifted After Shooting, Kidnapping Attempt in Newton
summary: A man was airlifted after a reported shooting and kidnapping attempt at a Love's truck stop in Newton.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the dangers faced by travelers and the potential for violence at truck stops.

title: Missing 73-Year-Old Man from Monroe Found Safe
summary: A 73-year-old man who was reported missing from Monroe has been found safe.
charlotte_impact: Provides relief and reassurance regarding the safety of vulnerable individuals.

title: Teen Hurt in Hit-and-Run at Charlotte Publix, Suspect Arrested
summary: A 14-year-old boy was injured in a hit-and-run in the parking lot of a Publix on Colwick Road; a suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of reckless driving and the importance of holding perpetrators accountable.
